metadata.title: EM Consulting — College Admissions Strategy
metadata.description: Wharton Huntsman Dual Degree and MIT admit. Structured admissions consulting for Chinese families targeting U.S. Top-20 universities.

hero.title: EM Consulting
hero.subtitle: Wharton Huntsman Dual Degree & MIT Early Action. Admissions strategy for Chinese families.

items.title: MIT + Wharton, same cycle
items.description: Not former admissions officers guessing from the outside. Applicants who navigated the system this year. We know the current standards because we just met them.

items.title: Five-milestone structured process
items.description: Defined deliverables and checkpoints at every stage. Not open-ended guidance — a trackable, documented strategy engagement.

items.title: Selective enrollment
items.description: We decline students we cannot meaningfully help. Our acceptance rate is part of the service — we do not take cases where we lack confidence in the outcome.

items.title: Native bilingual, native bicultural
items.description: Mandarin-first with parents, English-first with students. No translation layer, no cultural gap.

milestones.title: Strategic Positioning
milestones.deliverable: Positioning Deck: core narrative, school list (8–12), essay topic map

milestones.title: Profile Optimization
milestones.deliverable: Profile Roadmap: activity adjustments, recommendation strategy, test timeline

milestones.title: Essay Development
milestones.deliverable: Essay Portfolio: 3–4 feedback rounds per essay, entirely student-written

milestones.title: Application Review
milestones.deliverable: Submission Checklist: full materials review, mock interviews, parent sign-off

milestones.title: Post-Submission
milestones.deliverable: Decision Framework: waitlist strategy, multi-offer comparison

team.title: Team
team.together: We conduct all initial consultations together.

eric.name: Eric
credentials: Huntsman Program (Wharton + College of Arts & Sciences)

mary.name: Mary
credentials: Admitted to MIT (EA, Astrophysics) and Wharton (ED), same cycle

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: We do not guarantee admission outcomes. We guarantee the highest standard of strategic rigor at every stage.

audit.name: Admissions Audit
audit.description: 90-minute diagnostic session. Written assessment of positioning, competitiveness, and recommended strategy. Standalone deliverable, no obligation.

full.name: Full Package
full.description: Five-milestone engagement covering 8–12 schools. All deliverables included, with biweekly check-ins and regular parent updates.

contact.title: Contact
contact.ctaDescription: 90-minute diagnostic session to assess your child's positioning and our recommended direction.
contact.wechatDescription: Scan to add our advisor on WeChat
